requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling — RETIQ Mandatory Label (vs EU Ecodesign minimum-efficacy ban)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——RETIQ 强制标签（对比欧盟生态设计最低能效市场禁令）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——RETIQ 強制標籤（對比歐盟生態設計最低能效市場禁令）

summary.en: Colombia's energy-efficiency control for lighting is RETIQ (Reglamento Tecnico de Etiquetado), a mandatory technical regulation on energy-efficiency labelling administered under the Ministerio de Minas y Energia. For in-scope lighting products, RETIQ requires a mandatory comparative energy-efficiency label declaring the product's efficiency, demonstrated via a Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body and registered for SIC enforcement. Crucially, Colombia's primary mechanism is labelling and disclosure, not an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation that bans products below a minimum lm/W efficacy from the market. RETILAP additionally sets minimum lighting-performance and luminous-efficacy expectations for certain lamp and luminaire categories, but the RETIQ instrument itself is a labelling regime rather than a market-entry efficacy ban. Energy testing reflects the Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚针对照明的能效管控为 RETIQ（标签技术法规），是由能源矿业部管理的强制性能效标签技术法规。对适用照明产品，RETIQ 要求贴附强制性比较能效标签，声明产品能效，并通过 ONAC 认可机构出具的合格证书证明，登记后供 SIC 执法。关键在于，哥伦比亚的主要机制是标签与披露，而非欧盟式横向生态设计法规——后者将低于最低 lm/W 能效的产品禁止进入市场。RETILAP 还为特定灯和灯具类别设定最低照明性能及光效期望，但 RETIQ 工具本身是标签制度，而非市场准入能效禁令。能效检测反映哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 电源。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞針對照明的能效管控為 RETIQ（標籤技術法規），是由能源礦業部管理的強制性能效標籤技術法規。對適用照明產品，RETIQ 要求貼附強制性比較能效標籤，聲明產品能效，並通過 ONAC 認可機構出具的合格證書證明，登記後供 SIC 執法。關鍵在於，哥倫比亞的主要機制是標籤與披露，而非歐盟式橫向生態設計法規——後者將低於最低 lm/W 能效的產品禁止進入市場。RETILAP 還為特定燈和燈具類別設定最低照明性能及光效期望，但 RETIQ 工具本身是標籤制度，而非市場准入能效禁令。能效檢測反映哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 電源。

standards_or_laws: RETIQ — Reglamento Tecnico de Etiquetado (mandatory energy-efficiency labelling regulation, Ministerio de Minas y Energia)
RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (luminous-efficacy and lighting-performance content)
Certificate of Conformity issued by an ONAC-accredited certification body

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements / Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires), which defines energy efficiency grades (typically Grade 1 highest down to a Grade 3 minimum for market entry) and is paired with mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) registration administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP. Unlike RETIQ, GB 30255 functions as both a minimum-efficacy threshold for market entry and a comparative grade label. Chinese products are rated for 220 V, 50 Hz. The China Energy Label grade and the RETIQ label are calculated and presented differently and are not mutually recognised.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求/能效限定值及能效等级），定义能效等级（通常 1 级最高，至 3 级为市场准入最低值），并配套由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理的强制性中国能效标识（CEL）注册。与 RETIQ 不同，GB 30255 既作为市场准入的最低能效阈值，又作为比较等级标签。中国产品按 220 V、50 Hz 额定。中国能效标识等级与 RETIQ 标签的计算和呈现方式不同，且不互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求/能效限定值及能效等級），定義能效等級（通常 1 級最高，至 3 級為市場准入最低值），並配套由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理的強制性中國能效標識（CEL）注冊。與 RETIQ 不同，GB 30255 既作為市場准入的最低能效閾值，又作為比較等級標籤。中國產品按 220 V、50 Hz 額定。中國能效標識等級與 RETIQ 標籤的計算和呈現方式不同，且不互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China and Colombia require a mandatory comparative energy label, so the labelling obligation is conceptually similar — but they are non-mutual and calculated differently, and the China Energy Label cannot be reused for RETIQ. Key differences: (1) the RETIQ label content, scale, and graphic format follow the Colombian regulation, not the China Energy Label format, so a new Spanish-language label is required; (2) RETIQ requires a Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body; (3) Colombia's RETIQ is primarily a labelling/disclosure regime rather than an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign minimum-efficacy market ban, though RETILAP sets minimum luminous-efficacy and performance content for some categories — manufacturers should confirm the specific category thresholds; (4) energy testing must reflect 110/220 V, 60 Hz. A product holding only a China Energy Label grade has no RETIQ label and cannot be placed on the Colombian market without one.
gap.zh: 中国与哥伦比亚均要求强制性比较能效标签，故标签义务在概念上类似——但两者不互认且计算方式不同，中国能效标识不可复用于 RETIQ。主要差异：（1）RETIQ 标签内容、刻度及图形格式遵循哥伦比亚法规，而非中国能效标识格式，故须制作新的西班牙语标签；（2）RETIQ 要求由 ONAC 认可机构出具合格证书；（3）哥伦比亚 RETIQ 主要是标签/披露制度，而非欧盟式横向生态设计最低能效市场禁令，但 RETILAP 为部分类别设定最低光效及性能内容——制造商应确认具体类别阈值；（4）能效检测须反映 110/220 V、60 Hz。仅持有中国能效标识等级的产品没有 RETIQ 标签，无该标签不得进入哥伦比亚市场。
gap.zht: 中國與哥倫比亞均要求強制性比較能效標籤，故標籤義務在概念上類似——但兩者不互認且計算方式不同，中國能效標識不可複用於 RETIQ。主要差異：（1）RETIQ 標籤內容、刻度及圖形格式遵循哥倫比亞法規，而非中國能效標識格式，故須製作新的西班牙語標籤；（2）RETIQ 要求由 ONAC 認可機構出具合格證書；（3）哥倫比亞 RETIQ 主要是標籤/披露制度，而非歐盟式橫向生態設計最低能效市場禁令，但 RETILAP 為部分類別設定最低光效及性能內容——製造商應確認具體類別閾值；（4）能效檢測須反映 110/220 V、60 Hz。僅持有中國能效標識等級的產品沒有 RETIQ 標籤，無該標籤不得進入哥倫比亞市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETIQ comparative energy-efficiency label (with Certificate of Conformity via an ONAC-accredited body) required for in-scope lighting products before market placement in Colombia; RETIQ is a labelling regime, not an EU-style minimum-efficacy market ban
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255 minimum efficiency grade and China Energy Label (CEL) registration required for in-scope LED room luminaires

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETIQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia's RETIQ mandatory energy-efficiency label, demonstrated via an ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity, is the analogue of an EU energy label but is a labelling/disclosure regime rather than an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign minimum-efficacy ban (RETILAP separately sets some performance/efficacy content). China's GB 30255 grade and China Energy Label are mandatory but non-mutual and cannot be reused — a new RETIQ Spanish-language label and Colombian conformity assessment at 110/220 V, 60 Hz are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚 RETIQ 强制性能效标签（通过 ONAC 认可合格证书证明）相当于欧盟能效标签，但属标签/披露制度，而非欧盟式横向生态设计最低能效禁令（RETILAP 另行设定部分性能/能效内容）。中国 GB 30255 等级及中国能效标识为强制但不互认且不可复用——须制作新的 RETIQ 西班牙语标签并按 110/220 V、60 Hz 进行哥伦比亚合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞 RETIQ 強制性能效標籤（通過 ONAC 認可合格證書證明）相當於歐盟能效標籤，但屬標籤/披露制度，而非歐盟式橫向生態設計最低能效禁令（RETILAP 另行設定部分性能/能效內容）。中國 GB 30255 等級及中國能效標識為強制但不互認且不可複用——須製作新的 RETIQ 西班牙語標籤並按 110/220 V、60 Hz 進行哥倫比亞合格評定。

requirement_topic.en: No Horizontal Ecodesign / Energy-Using-Products Directive — Energy Handled via RETIQ + RETILAP
requirement_topic.zh: 无横向生态设计/耗能产品指令——能效通过 RETIQ + RETILAP 处理
requirement_topic.zht: 無橫向生態設計/耗能產品指令——能效通過 RETIQ + RETILAP 處理

summary.en: Unlike the EU, Colombia does not have a single horizontal Ecodesign / energy-related-products framework regulation that imposes design requirements such as minimum lifetime, minimum power factor, colour-rendering minimums, and survival factor across products as a market-entry condition. Colombia's energy-and-performance obligations for lighting are distributed across two instruments: RETIQ (mandatory comparative energy-efficiency labelling) and RETILAP (the lighting technical regulation, which sets minimum performance, photometric, and labelling content for specified lamp and luminaire categories). There is also no Colombian EPREL-style central energy product registry equivalent; conformity is evidenced through the Certificate of Conformity and importer registration, with SIC enforcement.
summary.zh: 与欧盟不同，哥伦比亚没有单一横向生态设计/能源相关产品框架法规，对产品施加诸如最低寿命、最低功率因数、最低显色指数及存活率等设计要求作为市场准入条件。哥伦比亚对照明的能效与性能义务分布于两个工具：RETIQ（强制性比较能效标签）及 RETILAP（照明技术法规，为指定灯和灯具类别设定最低性能、光度及标签内容）。哥伦比亚也没有相当于欧盟 EPREL 的中央能源产品注册系统；符合性通过合格证书及进口商登记证明，由 SIC 执法。
summary.zht: 與歐盟不同，哥倫比亞沒有單一橫向生態設計/能源相關產品框架法規，對產品施加諸如最低壽命、最低功率因數、最低顯色指數及存活率等設計要求作為市場准入條件。哥倫比亞對照明的能效與性能義務分布於兩個工具：RETIQ（強制性比較能效標籤）及 RETILAP（照明技術法規，為指定燈和燈具類別設定最低性能、光度及標籤內容）。哥倫比亞也沒有相當於歐盟 EPREL 的中央能源產品注冊系統；符合性通過合格證書及進口商登記證明，由 SIC 執法。

standards_or_laws: RETIQ — Reglamento Tecnico de Etiquetado (energy-efficiency labelling)
RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (minimum lighting-performance and labelling content)

summary.en: China likewise does not implement an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign directive, but it addresses lighting energy and performance through GB 30255 (energy efficiency grades / minimum allowable values for LED room luminaires) plus the mandatory China Energy Label, and through product-performance standards such as GB/T 24908 for self-ballasted LED lamps. Minimum efficacy for market entry in China is governed by the GB 30255 minimum grade. China's regime is mandatory but is structured around national GB efficiency standards and the China Energy Label rather than a single horizontal energy-using-products framework.
summary.zh: 中国同样未实施欧盟式横向生态设计指令，而是通过 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效等级/能效限定值）加强制性中国能效标识，以及如 GB/T 24908（自镇流 LED 灯）等产品性能标准来处理照明能效与性能。中国市场准入的最低能效由 GB 30255 最低等级管控。中国制度为强制性，但围绕国家 GB 能效标准及中国能效标识构建，而非单一横向耗能产品框架。
summary.zht: 中國同樣未實施歐盟式橫向生態設計指令，而是通過 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效等級/能效限定值）加強制性中國能效標識，以及如 GB/T 24908（自鎮流 LED 燈）等產品性能標準來處理照明能效與性能。中國市場准入的最低能效由 GB 30255 最低等級管控。中國制度為強制性，但圍繞國家 GB 能效標準及中國能效標識構建，而非單一橫向耗能產品框架。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Honest mapping: neither Colombia nor China has an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation, so the EU 'minimum lifetime / power factor / CRI / survival factor as a market-entry condition' bundle has no single direct counterpart in Colombia. Colombia's binding requirements come from RETIQ (the energy label) and RETILAP (category-specific minimum performance and declared photometric content). Practical gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) confirm which RETILAP minimum-performance and labelling parameters apply to the specific product category — these can include luminous flux, efficacy, CCT, CRI, and rated life that must be declared, and may differ from China's GB 30255 grading basis; (2) produce a RETIQ label per the Colombian format; (3) there is no EPREL-style registry, but the Certificate of Conformity and importer registration must be in place. Do not assume the EU Ecodesign design thresholds apply directly in Colombia — verify against the current RETIQ and RETILAP resolutions.
gap.zh: 诚实映射：哥伦比亚与中国均无欧盟式横向生态设计法规，故欧盟以最低寿命/功率因数/显色指数/存活率作为市场准入条件的组合在哥伦比亚无单一直接对应。哥伦比亚的约束性要求来自 RETIQ（能效标签）及 RETILAP（类别特定最低性能及声明光度内容）。中国出口商的实际差距：（1）确认具体产品类别适用的 RETILAP 最低性能及标签参数——可包括须声明的光通量、光效、色温、显色指数及额定寿命，可能不同于中国 GB 30255 分级基础；（2）按哥伦比亚格式制作 RETIQ 标签；（3）无 EPREL 式注册系统，但须办妥合格证书及进口商登记。请勿假设欧盟生态设计设计阈值在哥伦比亚直接适用——须对照现行 RETIQ 及 RETILAP 决议核验。
gap.zht: 誠實映射：哥倫比亞與中國均無歐盟式橫向生態設計法規，故歐盟以最低壽命/功率因數/顯色指數/存活率作為市場准入條件的組合在哥倫比亞無單一直接對應。哥倫比亞的約束性要求來自 RETIQ（能效標籤）及 RETILAP（類別特定最低性能及聲明光度內容）。中國出口商的實際差距：（1）確認具體產品類別適用的 RETILAP 最低性能及標籤參數——可包括須聲明的光通量、光效、色溫、顯色指數及額定壽命，可能不同於中國 GB 30255 分級基礎；（2）按哥倫比亞格式製作 RETIQ 標籤；（3）無 EPREL 式注冊系統，但須辦妥合格證書及進口商登記。請勿假設歐盟生態設計設計閾值在哥倫比亞直接適用——須對照現行 RETIQ 及 RETILAP 決議核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (distributed) — energy/performance obligations for lighting come from RETIQ (label) and RETILAP (category minimum performance); Colombia has no single horizontal Ecodesign directive and no EPREL-style central registry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (distributed) — GB 30255 minimum grade + China Energy Label and GB/T 24908 performance apply; China also has no single horizontal Ecodesign framework

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETIQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no EU-style horizontal Ecodesign directive; lighting energy and performance are handled through the RETIQ label and category-specific RETILAP minimum-performance/photometric content, with no EPREL-style central registry. The EU bundle of minimum lifetime, power factor, CRI, and survival factor as a single market-entry condition does not map one-to-one in Colombia — confirm the applicable RETIQ and RETILAP parameters for the specific product category and prepare the Colombian label and Certificate of Conformity at 110/220 V, 60 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚无欧盟式横向生态设计指令；照明能效与性能通过 RETIQ 标签及类别特定 RETILAP 最低性能/光度内容处理，无 EPREL 式中央注册系统。欧盟以最低寿命、功率因数、显色指数及存活率作为单一市场准入条件的组合在哥伦比亚无一一对应——须确认具体产品类别适用的 RETIQ 及 RETILAP 参数，并按 110/220 V、60 Hz 准备哥伦比亚标签及合格证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞無歐盟式橫向生態設計指令；照明能效與性能通過 RETIQ 標籤及類別特定 RETILAP 最低性能/光度內容處理，無 EPREL 式中央注冊系統。歐盟以最低壽命、功率因數、顯色指數及存活率作為單一市場准入條件的組合在哥倫比亞無一一對應——須確認具體產品類別適用的 RETIQ 及 RETILAP 參數，並按 110/220 V、60 Hz 準備哥倫比亞標籤及合格證書。
